channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Woman Exposes Househelp’s Theft Caught on Home CCTV
item.description: A Kenyan woman named Dorah recently discovered that her househelp had been stealing from her home, despite her treating the domestic worker like family. The incident came to light after reviewing foot...

item.title: UK Parliamentarians Ask Prime Minister To Raise Human Rights Concerns With President Tinubu During His State Visit
item.description: British lawmakers don dey call on Prime Minister Keir Starmer make he face Nigerian President Bola Tinubu with wahala wey concern di killing of Christians for Naija. Dis one dey happen as Tinubu land ...

item.title: Armed Attack in Plateau Leaves 20 Security Officers and Vigilantes Dead
item.description: For real matter, na heavy wahala happen for Plateau State as gunmen don kill at least 20 security personnel and local vigilantes for Garga area, Kanam Local Government. The incident happen around 4pm ...

item.title: Trump administration and Iran remain unwilling to engage in ceasefire negotiations
item.description: The Trump administration has declined attempts by Middle Eastern allies to begin diplomatic negotiations aimed at ending the war with Iran, which erupted following a major U.S.-Israeli air strike two ...

item.title: 37 Former POGO Workers Arrested for Large-Scale Bank Fraud in Laguna
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Authorities have arrested 37 individuals in San Pedro, Laguna for their involvement in a large-scale scamming operation. The suspects, former employees of Philippine Offshore Gam...

item.title: Federal review of electric vehicle tax exemption raises concerns for outer-suburban families
item.description: The federal government is reviewing the fringe benefits tax exemption for electric vehicles, which could see the Electric Car Discount phased out. Introduced in 2022, the discount has been claimed by ...

item.title: How Oburu Oginga’s Riverside Drive office is reshaping his political influence in ODM
item.description: The article focuses on how Siaya Senator Oburu Oginga has set up a new political nerve centre along Riverside Drive in Nairobi, signalling his growing clout within the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM)...

item.title: Man and others suffer long-term impact after false rape allegations
item.description: A woman from Farnworth, Stacey Sharples, 30, was sentenced to four-and-a-half years in prison at Bolton Crown Court for making false rape allegations against ten men between 2013 and 2019. Among the v...

item.title: Presidency Assumes Direct Control Of Nigerian Safety Investigation Bureau
item.description: Di Presidency don remove di Nigerian Safety Investigation Bureau (NSIB) from under Ministry of Aviation and Aerospace Development supervision, put am directly under di Presidency. President Bola Tinub...

item.title: Government directed to place Buzwagi Industrial Park under TISEZA for smoother investment
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Administration, Constitution and Legal Affairs has instructed the government to move the coordination of Buzwagi Industrial Park from the Kahama District Counci...

item.title: Coco Martin expresses gratitude to fans of FPJ’s Batang Quiapo after three years on air
item.description: Coco Martin, lead actor and producer of the popular television series 'FPJ’s Batang Quiapo,' recently expressed his heartfelt gratitude to the viewers and supporters who have stayed loyal to the show ...

item.title: Ryan Coogler’s 'Sinners' Explores Racism and Cultural Roots through Supernatural Horror
item.description: Ryan Coogler’s film 'Sinners' has become one of the most discussed films of 2025, featuring prominently in Hollywood year-end lists and early Oscar conversations. Set in 1932 in the American South, th...

item.title: Jarlo Base honors Filipino pride through Apl.de.ap performance on YFSF 2026
item.description: In Week 12 of 'Your Face Sounds Familiar 2026,' Jarlo Base delivered a remarkable tribute to Filipino pride by performing as Apl.de.ap, a founding member of the iconic global group, Black Eyed Peas. H...

item.title: Ray Emodi Clarifies: Shift to Music Was His True Calling, Not Trauma or Family Pressure
item.description: Nollywood actor and singer Ray Emodi don clear the air for TVC interview say him no leave acting because of traumatic experiences or family pressure like some people dey report before. Him talk say hi...

item.title: Orlando Pirates held to 1-1 draw by Siwelele in Betway Premiership title race
item.description: Orlando Pirates dropped two crucial points in the Betway Premiership after being held to a 1-1 draw by Siwelele FC in an intense match at Orlando Stadium. Starting the day at the top of the log, Pirat...

item.title: Vairamuthu becomes first Tamil poet to win Jnanpith Award
item.description: Chennai: Eminent Tamil poet and lyricist Vairamuthu has been conferred with the prestigious Jnanpith Award for the year 2025, marking a significant milestone in Tamil literature. He is the third Tamil...

item.title: New Research Shows Hair Is Pulled Upward by Cells, Not Pushed from the Root
item.description: Recent research from Queen Mary University of London and L'Oréal Research & Innovation has challenged the long-held belief that human hair grows by being pushed out from the root. Using advanced 3D li...

item.title: Nigerians Among Those Injured as Iranian Strikes Hit UAE Amid Gulf Tensions
item.description: The United Arab Emirates don report say Nigerians dey among 141 people wey suffer injury because of Iranian attacks for the past two weeks. The UAE Ministry of Defence talk on X on Saturday say differ...

item.title: Delroy Lindo and the Trend of Late-Career Oscar Recognition
item.description: Delroy Lindo, the London-born actor who has been a consistent presence in American cinema for decades, has received his first Oscar nomination at the age of 73 for his role as Delta Slim in Ryan Coogl...

item.title: Shinyanga Solar Project Nears Completion; Second Phase Budgeted at Sh216bn
item.description: The Tanzanian government has earmarked Sh216 billion for the second phase of the Shinyanga Solar Power Project, as the first phase nears completion. The project, located in Shinyanga, is designed to i...
